parameters.command:
=echo "{{ $json.stateB64 }}" | base64 -d > ~/agent/state.json
if [ "{{ $json.isNew }}" = "true" ]; then
  echo "# סשן — $(TZ=Asia/Jerusalem date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" > ~/agent/today.md
  if [ -n "{{ $json.archiveFile }}" ]; then
    sed '/<!-- RAW-LOG -->/q' ~/agent/"{{ $json.archiveFile }}"
  fi
fi
cat /home/ubuntu/agent/core/*.md /home/ubuntu/agent/today.md 2>/dev/null; echo ""; echo "--- ARCHIVE DIGESTS ---"; head -n 25 /home/ubuntu/agent/archive/*.md 2>/dev/null

=cat >> /home/ubuntu/agent/today.md << 'BOKEREOF'

### {{ $now.setZone('Asia/Jerusalem').toFormat('HH:mm') }}
יהודה: {{ $('Telegram Trigger').item.json.message.text }}
בוקר טוב: {{ $('Parse Reply').first().json.cleanText }}
BOKEREOF

python3 - << 'PYEOF'
import datetime
now = datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc).strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
msg = """{{ $('Telegram Trigger').item.json.message.text }}""".strip().replace('
', ' ')
pos = "{{ $('Parse Reply').first().json.pos }}"
line = f"[{now}] Msg: '{msg}' | Pos: {pos}\n"
with open('/home/ubuntu/agent/n8n-activity.log', 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(line)
PYEOF

=if [ "{{ $json.active }}" = "true" ]; then
  echo "{{ $json.archiveB64 }}" | base64 -d > ~/agent/"{{ $json.fname }}"
  echo "{{ $json.stateB64 }}" | base64 -d > ~/agent/state.json
  > ~/agent/today.md
fi

parameters.text: ={{ $('Prepare Archive').first().json.active ? 'הסשן נסגר ונשמר בארכיון. נתראה בסשן הבא 👋' : 'אין סשן פעיל לסגור.' }}

parameters.command:
python3 - << 'PYEOF'
import json, pathlib, datetime

state_path = pathlib.Path('/home/ubuntu/agent/state.json')
if not state_path.exists():
    exit(0)

state = json.loads(state_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
timer = state.get('flow', {}).get('timer')
chat_id = state.get('session', {}).get('chat_id')

if timer and timer.get('active') and not timer.get('pinged') and chat_id:
    ends_at_str = timer.get('ends_at')
    if ends_at_str:
        ends_at = datetime.datetime.fromisoformat(ends_at_str)
        now = datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc)
        if now >= ends_at:
            timer['pinged'] = True
            state_path.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False), encoding='utf-8')
            msg = f"⏰ הטיימר למשימה \"{timer.get('task', 'המשימה')}\" הסתיים! איך הולך? סיימת?"
            print(json.dumps([{"json": {"chat_id": chat_id, "text": msg, "should_send": True}}]))
            exit(0)

print(json.dumps([{"json": {"should_send": False}}]))
PYEOF

=python3 - << 'PYEOF'
import datetime, json

now = datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc).strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
node_name = "{{ $json.node.name }}"
err_msg = "{{ $json.execution.error.message }}"

line = f"[{now}] ⚠️ ERROR in '{node_name}': {err_msg}\n"
with open('/home/ubuntu/agent/n8n-errors.log', 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(line)
PYEOF
